calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-25-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-25-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Britta Peterson appeared by zoom for Wayne Froderberg (petitioner/proposed executor).

The court noted that no one has come forward to invoke the presumption under 12401 or Evidence Code 667 to establish death of Benjamin Meyer Jr. as a missing person. Mrs. Peterson stated that no one has an interest in opening an estate for Benjamin, that he does not take under the will, that there are no family records, that they searched obituaries and that the decedent had not heard from Benjamin in close to 50 years. The court accepts the two declarations of due diligence to find that Benjamin cannot be found. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 20, 2022, is admitted to probate. Wayne Froderberg is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $73,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for November 25, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Colhour. Not reported.
